title: ws.rs: GROUP_ADD handler
description:
What: Add GROUP_ADD relay WebSocket handler in relay/src/ws.rs.

Algorithm:
1. Parse GroupAddParams { group_id, member_pub_id }
2. Validate member_pub_id format: must be exactly 64 lowercase hex chars (regex or manual check)
3. store.is_group_member(group_id, pub_id.0).await → caller must be a member; if not: NOT_A_MEMBER error
4. store.get_group(group_id).await → group must exist; if not: GROUP_NOT_FOUND error
5. store.add_group_member(group_id, member_pub_id).await  -- INSERT OR IGNORE (idempotent)
6. Build GROUP_DELIVER notification to new member: GroupDeliverParams { from: pub_id.0, group_id, payload: group_name_utf8_bytes }
7. deliver_live(member_pub_id, notif_json).await; if false: enqueue(member_pub_id, notif_json).await
8. Return OkResult { ok: true }

Note: MLS Welcome for new member is handled client-side via WHISPER. Relay only tracks membership.

Defensive rules:
- pub_id format check: reject if not 64 hex chars (CLAUDE.md §6)
- relay SETS from from authenticated pub_id, never from params (CLAUDE.md §4)
- Double-add is idempotent (INSERT OR IGNORE)
- GROUP_DELIVER payload is opaque bytes; relay never deserializes it (invariant #3)

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay passes; adding invalid pub_id format returns INVALID_PARAMS; adding to non-existent group returns GROUP_NOT_FOUND; non-member add returns NOT_A_MEMBER
